replies.msg: 原來8月尾先發貨

岩岩查完

499 + 15 usd 寄到香港

暫時有3個有興趣(包括我), 今晚唔夠數就由佢

計返每位大約515 到530 hkd (mtr 面交既話)
仲以為錫安劍
有冇咁勁呀 32 個鐘電

尋日打左email問，有巴打話訂4 pack或以下個個先會有charging case，但供應商覆返話因為字數限制所以show唔晒咁多。

5 到9 pack個d都有charging case，尋晚為止有6個，仲差2個。

但我諗有d又已經走左，今晚睇下夠唔夠人，夠人就開團


btw，要比50% 訂，信唔過我既話可以等其他巴打。

大約515 to 530 hkd 一個

有意https://t.me/Dbdb62

replies.msg: 呢排比較忙未得閒處理..第7團暫時得2個，唔夠人就遲d退返訂

Hello backers,

We wanted to send a reminder for all backers to PLEASE complete your survey at: https://xfyro-aria.backerkit.com/. We are still missing a large amount of responses, and we want to make sure all backers make the first shipment!

Please note: newer backers that have backed in the past ~12 days may not have received their survey yet - please don't worry - you'll receive it very soon!

We will be locking in surveys and charging credit cards for add-ons at Sunday August 26, 2018, 11:59 PM PT. If we do not have most surveys completed on time, we may have to delay shipment to accommodate - please help us make sure this does not happen!

Please note that the prices of accessories / add-ons may increase or be unavailable altogether after we first lock in orders, as that will be the confirmed production batch. Make sure to get yours before it's too late!

Please note:

After locking in your survey, you will still be able to edit your shipping address
Declined credit card charges will not allow us to lock your survey and may delay your order
ALL backers must fill out their survey to receive their order - no exceptions! Your shipping address is based on your BackerKit address - NOT your Indiegogo address
Please contact BackerKit, our survey vendor, or any additional questions regarding the survey: https://xfyro-aria.backerkit.com/faq#contact-us. For other questions - please contact us at indiegogo@xfyro.com!

Again - thank you all for your support!

xFyro Audio

We are doing final QC on these units – we work with SGS, a reputable, publicly traded Swiss inspection company, to test each and every unit out of our assembly line. At their current run rate, we expect the first few thousand units to be ready to be shipped out from our factory to our shipper by the end of next week.

We will be shipping international orders first, as we can ship those directly from China! For US shipments, we will be sending via sea, which will take 3-4 weeks to arrive the US, after which we will ship to all customers within 2-4 business days. We don’t immediately get tracking for international orders, but please expect tracking confirmation emails in the next 3 weeks! You can check your tracking information on BackerKit, but you will receive a tracking confirmation via email. When we receive tracking information, we will upload to BackerKit first - this is the most up to date information and where our customer service will pull from.
